calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-28-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2020 Continued To Jan-11-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ashwin Ladva, esq. (415-296-8844) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs MARIA ESCOBAR and ANGIE ESCOBAR's Motion To Compel Further Interrogatory Responses; Request For Monetary Sanctions:

It appears that plaintiff is satisfied with the supplemental responses that were received after the motion was filed. Sanctions in the amount of $1,260 awarded to be paid by defendant and her counsel on or before March 15, 2020 as the supplemental responses differ significantly from the original responses.

order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Set For Trial On Oct-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Lyle B. Trainer
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court's tentative ruling is adopted in its entirety:

DEFENDANT DIONNE DAVIS' Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is granted.

[See word minutes for the Court's full ruling.]

Counsel for the defendant is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Defendant Dionne Davis' Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint [Part 2 Of 2 For Tentative Ruling]
